query:
INSERT INTO `helpVideos` (`title`, `description`, `youtubeUrl`, `videoId`, `category`, `tags`, `sortOrder`) VALUES
('GoHighLevel Account Setup', 'Walk your client through creating their GHL account from scratch. Covers signup, choosing the $97/mo plan, and initial dashboard orientation.', 'https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=YmYNiMH8uQQ', 'YmYNiMH8uQQ', 'GHL Setup', 'ghl,setup,account,signup,new account', 1),
('Add Agency Admin in GHL', 'Show your client how to add your team as an agency admin in their GoHighLevel account. Required for building funnels, automations, and workflows.', 'https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=njgC28VeUEc', 'njgC28VeUEc', 'GHL Setup', 'ghl,agency,admin,access,team,permissions', 2),
('Domain Setup in GHL', 'Guide your client through buying a new domain, transferring an existing one, or connecting a domain they already own inside GoHighLevel.', 'https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=L7COia29_Cs', 'L7COia29_Cs', 'Domain & Hosting', 'domain,dns,hosting,transfer,buy domain,connect', 3),
('Phone Number Purchase in GHL', 'Help your client buy a dedicated phone number inside GHL for SMS follow-ups, calls, and automation triggers.', 'https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=t1wPfy7PTRw', 't1wPfy7PTRw', 'Phone & SMS', 'phone,sms,number,twilio,calls,text', 4),
('Add User to Meta Business Manager', 'Walk your client through adding you as a user in their Meta Business Manager so you can set up ad campaigns, tracking pixels, and CAPI integration.', 'https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=r9bwiFVUezE', 'r9bwiFVUezE', 'Facebook & Ads', 'facebook,meta,business manager,ads,pixel,access,admin', 5);
